custom-tax.name: Custom Tax
custom-tax.description: Configure a custom tax calculation by providing your own APIs.

custom-shipping.name: Custom Shipping
custom-shipping.description: Configure a custom shipping calculation by providing your own APIs.

custom-payment.name: Custom Payment
custom-payment.description: Configure a custom payment integration by providing your own APIs.

sf-payments.name: Salesforce Payments
sf-payments.description: Process payments natively in Storefront Next. Salesforce Payments supports multiple payment gateways and methods.

custom-analytics.name: Custom Analytics
custom-analytics.description: Configure a custom analytics integration by providing your own APIs.

checkoutcom-payments.name: Checkout.com Payments
checkoutcom-payments.description: Accept cards, wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal) and alternative payment methods (Klarna, Alma, Sequra, MB WAY, Bizum, Tabby, ACH) with Checkout.com. Includes 3D Secure, auto-capture, capture/void/refund management from Business Manager and webhook reconciliation.
